rows.meaning: Distinct compact-chapters a pattern must recur across (with no covering note) before `mage promote` drafts a NEW note candidate. Counts chapters, not session ids — one continuously-compacted chat still accrues recurrence.
Distinct compact-chapters a proven procedural note must recur across before it can graduate into its own loadable `mage-skill-<slug>`.
Authored-note body char cap; past it `mage groom` proposes a split. A quality floor — the dial never moves it.
Context-match rate below which a generated skill's trigger is flagged for reword (imported from context-match.ts; single-sourced).
Context-match rate below which a generated skill is flagged for demote back to its note (imported from context-match.ts).
Minimum skill auto-loads before context-match is allowed to suggest reword/demote — no judgement on thin evidence.
Max edits `mage:optimize` applies per pass — a bounded textual learning rate so a skill never thrashes.
Max note candidates `mage promote` surfaces per pass (ranked strongest-first); the rest defer to the next pass.
SOFT target size for an organic lesson draft (`mage stage`) — one distilled fact + Why/How. `mage stage` warns past it but never blocks (frictionless inline capture).
Max staged lesson drafts `mage groom` surfaces per pass (anti-flood); the rest defer.

hooks.purpose: Capture session-start context into the git-ignored learnings scratch.

The boundary nudge: on a post-compaction SessionStart, surface the just-closed chapter's earned-signal digest (failures, external commands, corrections) as additionalContext for the agent to mine and `mage stage` (ADR-0029). The additionalContext is scaled by the per-KB autonomy level (Operator/Approver/Overseer, ADR-0030): at Operator it is a reminder; at Approver/Overseer it becomes the agent's mandate to groom and write durable notes into the working tree (uncommitted, Gate-2 enforced). It also carries a deterministic capped backlog tally — staged drafts, unmined closed chapters (capped at 9+), and graduation-eligible signatures from the persisted promote tally — rendered as one work-list line. Fires on SessionStart source compact/startup/resume (clear stays a fast no-op); the backlog scan is mtime-gated so a no-new-scratch startup/resume stays ~instant.
Capture each tool use — which tool, which files, which skill loaded.
Capture tool failures (a distinct salient signal).
Mark the chapter boundary just before the host compacts.
Roll up context-match: did the skills that auto-loaded actually match the work that followed?
Capture the agent's final reply (ADR-0019 amendment to ADR-0015).
Capture autonomous subagent work — a Task subagent's final reply, the one capture point for multi-agent workflows.

commands.name: init
commands.summary: Initialize mage: an in-repo knowledge base, or a standalone hub

options.description: scaffold the knowledge base inside this code repo's mage/
create a standalone hub (vs an in-repo KB) at the current dir or <name>
removed in 0.0.10 — use --hub
deprecated: pass the hub name as the positional argument instead
hub mode: explicit hub directory (overrides <name>)
hub mode: create as private GitHub repo (requires gh)
hub mode: create as public GitHub repo (requires gh)
hub mode: skip GitHub — local-only hub
hub mode: GitHub owner (auto-detected via `gh api user`)
in-repo mode: project name (default: basename of code repo)
non-interactive: use defaults (detect in-repo vs hub from the cwd)
skip auto-wiring capture hooks after an in-repo init

commands.name: index
commands.summary: (Re)generate INDEX.md + the Claude Code MEMORY.md twin — the always-loaded index of notes (deterministic, idempotent)

options.description: where to look for the knowledge base (default: cwd; walks up for in-repo)

commands.name: skills
commands.summary: (Re)generate one auto-loaded skill per wing into .claude/skills/ and .agents/skills/

options.description: where to look for the knowledge base (default: cwd; walks up for in-repo)
read-only: fold the context-match rollup and report skill-load match rates (never regenerates skills)
metrics mode: emit the rows as JSON instead of a table
metrics mode: fold + write the rollup silently (the Stop-hook path)

commands.name: dream
commands.summary: Report knowledge-base health, read-only: stale, superseded-but-active, dangling links, orphans

options.description: where to look for the knowledge base (default: cwd; walks up for in-repo)
flag notes whose last_reviewed is older than N days (default 180)
exit non-zero if any findings (for hooks/CI)
apply ONE confirmed Proposal JSON from stdin (the single writer; never commits)
append ONE Proposal JSON from stdin to the rejected-edit buffer (back off)

commands.name: ingest
commands.summary: Enumerate + classify ingestable sources under <dir> (read-only) — what `mage:learn --from` distills.

options.description: emit the manifest as JSON to stdout (machine-readable)

commands.name: distill
commands.summary: Read observed .mage/learnings into note candidates (plumbing behind mage:groom Phase 1)

options.description: where to look for the knowledge base (default: cwd; walks up for in-repo)
emit the candidate manifest as JSON
advance the distill watermark after a batch is dispositioned

commands.name: promote
commands.summary: Fold observed .mage/learnings into recurring note candidates (plumbing behind mage:groom Phase 2)

options.description: where to look for the knowledge base (default: cwd; walks up for in-repo)
emit the note-candidate manifest as JSON
advance the promote offset after a batch is dispositioned

commands.name: stage
commands.summary: Stage a short lesson draft into .mage/staging/ (frictionless inline capture — the organic grooming loop)

options.description: where to look for the knowledge base (default: cwd; walks up for in-repo)
lesson title (required — drives the H1 and slug)
note type (default: gotcha)
comma-separated wing/room tags
convenience wing (prepended as a tag when none homes there)
lesson body (else read from stdin)
emit the result as JSON

commands.name: groom
commands.summary: Surface / accept / reject the staged lesson batch (plumbing behind the mage:groom skill)

options.description: where to look for the knowledge base (default: cwd; walks up for in-repo)
emit the batch / disposition as JSON
promote these staged drafts to notes/ and re-index
discard these staged drafts and record their keys

commands.name: observe
commands.summary: Hook-fired capture seam: read a Claude Code hook JSON on stdin and append one event to .mage/learnings/ (ADR-0015; never blocks the host)

options.description: session id (overrides the session field in the hook JSON)
force the event type (session_start|user_prompt|assistant_msg|skill_load|tool_use|compact|session_end); default: inferred from the hook payload
working directory used to locate the knowledge base (overrides the hook JSON cwd; defaults to it, then process.cwd())

commands.name: nudge
commands.summary: Hook-fired boundary nudge: on a SessionStart (compact/startup/resume), surface the closed chapter's earned-signal digest plus the autonomy-scaled grooming backlog for the agent to mine and `mage stage`/`mage:groom` (ADR-0029/0030; never blocks the host)

options.description: working directory used to locate the knowledge base (overrides the hook JSON cwd; defaults to it, then process.cwd())

commands.name: redact
commands.summary: Deterministically scan a file or stdin for secrets/PII (ADR-0014 Gate 2); --strip emits redacted text

options.description: print the redacted text to stdout (secret values → [REDACTED:<kind>])
suppress the findings report
scan staged git changes (the pre-commit gate)
report-only intent for hooks
